# Plan Task

Use [AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md), [Subagent System](../../docs/ai/subagents/README.md), [planner.md](../../docs/ai/subagents/planner.md), and [Task Brief Template](../../docs/ai/tasks/TEMPLATE.md).

For the current request:

1. summarize the task and key constraints
2. identify the smallest safe implementation approach
3. define file ownership and write scopes
4. capture acceptance criteria and validation steps
5. return a compact task brief ready for implementer, reviewer, and tester handoff
